stories.title: India Celebrates 50 Years of Aryabhata Satellite Launch
stories.summary: India marks a big milestone as it remembers launching its very first satellite, Aryabhata, back in 1975. This tiny spacecraft helped India become one of the early countries to explore space. Today, India's space agency ISRO continues to build on that legacy with many exciting missions.
stories.videoQuery: Aryabhata India first satellite ISRO history

stories.title: World Backup Day Reminds Everyone to Save Their Files
stories.summary: March 31 is World Backup Day, a special day that reminds people to save copies of their important photos, schoolwork, and files so they don't lose them forever. Tech experts say millions of people lose their data every year because of accidents or broken devices. It is a great habit to back up your files to a safe place like a hard drive or the cloud.
stories.videoQuery: World Backup Day how to backup your data kids

stories.title: Scientists Track Record Ocean Temperatures Heading Into 2026
stories.summary: Climate researchers have reported that ocean temperatures around the world remain at record high levels as we enter the second quarter of 2026. Warm oceans can affect weather patterns, cause stronger storms, and harm coral reefs that many sea animals call home. Scientists are urging governments to act quickly to help cool the planet.
stories.videoQuery: ocean temperatures climate change 2026 explained for kids

stories.title: IPL 2026 Season Heats Up with Thrilling Matches
stories.summary: The Indian Premier League cricket tournament is in full swing, with teams competing in exciting matches across stadiums in India. Fans are cheering loudly as their favourite players hit big sixes and take incredible wickets. The competition is very close this year, making it hard to predict who will lift the trophy.

stories.title: Easter Weekend Brings Joy to Millions Around the World
stories.summary: People in many countries are celebrating Easter this weekend with egg hunts, family gatherings, and special meals. Easter is one of the most important holidays for Christians and is also a fun springtime celebration for many others. Cities around the world have organised parades and community events to mark the occasion.

infographic.topic: Why Backing Up Your Data is Super Important
infographic.fact1: About 1 in 3 people have lost their files due to accidents — that's a LOT of missing homework and precious photos!
infographic.fact2: The word 'backup' means making a second copy of your files so you always have a spare, just like a spare tyre on a car.
infographic.fact3: Cloud storage saves your files on powerful computers far away, so even if your device breaks, your data is safe.
infographic.fact4: World Backup Day started in 2011 to remind everyone to protect their digital memories every single year.
